zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Whitney於1206年出生在英國賀福爾特尼--也時，她的父親Eustace de Whitney21歲，母親Ann Talbot22歲。她於1229年與Hamon de Massey V在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年在英國爾鄧翰 梅西享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Whitney于1206年出生在英国賀福爾特尼--也时，她的父亲Eustace de Whitney21岁，母亲Ann Talbot22岁。她于1229年与Hamon de Massey V在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1273年在英国爾鄧翰 梅西享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitney in Herefordshire, the etymology of which is uncertain. The second element is Old English ēg ‘island, piece of higher ground in a low-lying area’; the first appears to be hwītan, which is either the genitive singular of an Old English byname Hwīta (meaning ‘white’), or the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of the adjective hwīt ‘white’. The name may also derive from Whitney (now Whitney Wood) in Stevenage (Hertfordshire), probably named from Old English hwītan ‘white’ + (ge)hæge ‘enclosure’.
History: John Whitney came from London, England, to Watertown, MA, in 1635, and had numerous prominent descendents.

variants.name: Witney
meanings: English: habitational name from Witney in Oxfordshire, which for centuries was a centre of the wool trade, famous in particular for the manufacture of blankets. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’. There may have been some confusion with Whitney .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Whitney was born in 1206, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, her father, Eustace de Whitney, was 21 and her mother, Ann Talbot, was 22. She married Hamon de Massey V in 1229, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1273, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Whitney est née en 1206, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Eustace de Whitney, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ann Talbot, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon de Massey V en 1229, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1273, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Whitney 1206 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eustace de Whitney 21 und ihre Mutter Ann Talbot 22. Sie hat 1229 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Hamon de Massey V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1273 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Whitney è nata il nel 1206 nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Eustace de Whitney, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Ann Talbot, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hamon de Massey V nel 1229, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1273, nel Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Whitneyが1206年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで生まれた時，父Eustace de Whitneyは21歳，母Ann Talbotは22歳であった。1229年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでHamon de Massey Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1273年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Whitney(이)가 1206년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eustace de Whitney(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Talbot(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1229년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Hamon de Massey V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Whitney nasceu em 1206, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eustace de Whitney, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ann Talbot, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hamon de Massey V em 1229, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1273, em Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Whitney родилась в 1206 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Eustace de Whitney было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ann Talbot, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon de Massey V в 1229 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1273 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Whitney nació en 1206, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eustace de Whitney, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ann Talbot, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hamon de Massey V en 1229, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1273, en Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
